docs.title: Welcome
docs.text:
Hello and welcome to Dungeon Diaries, my site / blog for my latest DnD campaign.

This site will be used to store session notes and useful information for my players.

It is very much a work in progress.... Enjoy !

docs.title: My first blog post
docs.text:
So this is my first blogpost on Dungeon Diaries...

I've set this site up in an effort to keep my players informed of whats going on. Ive been doing quite a bit of prep this weekend for my upcoming DnD 5e campaign (start date still to be finalised).

Ive prepped some stl's for printing and painting, although not player character minis as the players have just started another campaign - Curse of Strahd - with another DM but once thats finished we can finalise what characters will be played by who... although I think their current DM will be playing a Bard !

Thinking of using Ultimate Dungeone Terrain (UDT) as a method of doing combat, I have the materials to build 4 double sided terrain boards but I think I'll not need any more than 2 double sided at most.

Anyway thats enough rambling from me.

S ...

docs.title: Log
docs.text:
Our players venture to Stormwreck Isle to visit the cloister of Dragons Rest. On the journey they are interrupted by a Merrow climbing on board their boat demanding a tribute to be paid to the scaled queen.,

After the encounter with the Merrow the players reach Stormwreck Isle
